LanguageData.VAspirE_ChainsawHands.description: {0} wants to get a gene that improves innate hand melee attacks.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ChainsawHands.label: get a melee gene
LanguageData.VAspirE_MeetAngelicPawn.description: {0} wants to meet an angelic being that radiates a pristine beauty.
LanguageData.VAspirE_MeetAngelicPawn.label: meet an angelic being
LanguageData.VAspirE_RaidABioLab.label: raid a bio-lab
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseXenotypeInjector.description: {0} wants to change xenotype by using a xenotype injector.
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseXenotypeInjector.label: change xenotype
LanguageData.VAspirE_Winged.description: {0} wants to get a gene that gives wings.
LanguageData.VAspirE_Winged.label: fly
LanguageData.VAspirE_BeBondedToARoyalAnimal.descripti: {0} would like to bond with one of the royal animals.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BeBondedToARoyalAnimal.label: be bonded to a royal animal
LanguageData.VAspirE_NuzzleWithTheFleshling.descripti: {0} would like to nuzzle with the fleshling monstrosity.
LanguageData.VAspirE_NuzzleWithTheFleshling.label: nuzzle with the fleshling
LanguageData.VAspirE_AcquireSuperpower.label: gain a superpower
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConsumeOpium.label: consume opium
LanguageData.VAspirE_JoinTheDeserters.description: {0} wants to join the deserter cause.
LanguageData.VAspirE_JoinTheDeserters.label: join the deserters
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseADeclassifier.description: {0} wants to see what it’s like to use a deserter declassifier on an enemy noble.
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseADeclassifier.label: use a declassifier
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAConsul.description: {0} wants to gain a rank of a consul in the imperial hierarchy.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAConsul.label: become a consul
LanguageData.VAspirE_DrinkAperitif.description: {0} would like to taste the luxury that is the aperitif.
LanguageData.VAspirE_DrinkAperitif.label: drink aperitif
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetEntombed.description: {0} wants to be entombed in a warcasket.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetEntombed.label: get entombed
LanguageData.VAspirE_EarnACornerstone.description: {0} desires to witness the technological advancement of their faction, the achievement of the cornerstone.
LanguageData.VAspirE_EarnACornerstone.label: earn a cornerstone
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAnAndroidLover.description: {0} wants to fall in love with an android.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAnAndroidLover.label: become an android lover
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeTranscendent.description: {0} wants to become one of the transcendent.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeTranscendent.label: become transcendent
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeFungoid.description: {0} wants to have the fungal flesh gene.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeFungoid.label: become a fungoid
LanguageData.VAspirE_RideInAClassicCar.description: {0} would love to feel classy and ride in the classic car.
LanguageData.VAspirE_RideInAClassicCar.label: ride in a classic car
